mapper.sql: id, room_id, title, total_amount, initiator_student_id, occurred_date, due_time, status, remark, source_voucher_attach_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select: select rs.room_id as roomId, building.room_num as buildingNum, room.room_num as roomNum, coalesce(sum(case when d.student_id = #{studentId} and d.pay_status = 0 and c.status = 1 then d.amount_due else 0 end), 0) as myUnpaidAmount, coalesce(sum(case when d.pay_status = 0 and c.status = 1 then d.amount_due else 0 end), 0) as roomUnpaidAmount, coalesce(sum(case when d.pay_status = 0 and c.status = 1 and date_format(c.occurred_date, '%Y-%m') = date_format(current_date, '%Y-%m') then d.amount_due else 0 end), 0) as currentMonthRoomUnpaidAmount from room_student rs left join dormitory room on room.id = rs.room_id and room.delflag = 0 and room.parent_id != '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}' left join dormitory building on building.id = room.parent_id and building.delflag = 0 and building.parent_id = '${@cloud.ciky.base.constant.SystemConstants@ROOT_NODE_ID}' left join dm_shared_cost c on c.room_id = room.id and c.delflag = 0 left join dm_shared_cost_detail d on d.cost_id = c.id and d.delflag = 0 where rs.is_current = 1 and rs.student_id = #{studentId} group by rs.room_id

select c.id, c.title, c.total_amount as totalAmount, c.initiator_student_id as initiatorStudentId, us.real_name as initiatorName, c.occurred_date as occurredDate, c.due_time as dueTime, c.status, c.remark, c.source_voucher_attach_id as sourceVoucherAttachId, sa.name as sourceVoucherName, sa.bucket as sourceVoucherBucket, sa.path as sourceVoucherPath from dm_shared_cost c left join user_student us on us.id = c.initiator_student_id and us.delflag = 0 left join dm_system.sys_attach sa on sa.id = c.source_voucher_attach_id and sa.delflag = 0 where c.id = #{id} and c.room_id = #{roomId} and c.delflag = 0 limit 1

select rs.student_id as studentId, us.real_name as studentName from room_student rs join user_student us on us.id = rs.student_id and us.delflag = 0 where rs.room_id = #{roomId} and rs.is_current = 1 order by us.real_name
select count(1) from dm_shared_cost_detail where cost_id = #{costId} and delflag = 0 and pay_status = 0
